summary: Iteration 23 - WhatsApp Marketing Campaign Feature testing complete. All backend APIs (23/23 tests passed) and frontend UI functionality verified. The new Marketing Campaign feature includes: 4 tabs (Configuration, Send Messages, Marketing Campaign, Logs), campaign composer with batch size control (1-50), interval seconds (min 5), PDF/Image attachments, target audience options (All Members, Event Registrations, Custom Phone List), filter by plan, and random reference code generation (IDSEA-XXXXXX format) to avoid WhatsApp blocking.
critical_code_review_comments: WhatsappAdmin.jsx: Complete rewrite with 4 tabs - Configuration, Send Messages, Marketing Campaign, Logs
WhatsappAdmin.jsx: Campaign composer has all required fields - name, message, media upload, target audience, batch size, interval, reference code toggle
WhatsappAdmin.jsx: Message preview shows {name} replaced with 'Dr. Sample Person' and reference code appended
WhatsappAdmin.jsx: Campaign History shows progress bar with sent/failed/total counts and status badges
Backend server.py: AK Nexus v2 API functions (aknexus_v2_post/get) with Bearer token auth
Backend server.py: send_whatsapp_message/image/document functions for different media types
Backend server.py: Campaign endpoint creates background task with batching and interval delays
Backend server.py: Reference code generation uses IDSEA-XXXXXX format with random alphanumeric characters
Backend server.py: Batch size enforced 1-50, interval minimum 5 seconds
seed_data_creation: Test campaigns created during backend tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp Marketing Campaign feature fully functional. Key features tested: 1) 4 tabs - Configuration, Send Messages, Marketing Campaign, Logs, 2) Campaign composer with batch size (1-50), interval (min 5 sec), media attachments (image/PDF), target audience options, 3) Reference code toggle adds unique IDSEA-XXXXXX to each message, 4) Campaign History shows progress with sent/failed/total counts, 5) Logs tab shows message history with phone, type, message, status, time columns. WhatsApp instance shows 'Disconnected' since no active instance is configured - this is expected behavior.

backend_apis.POST /api/admin/whatsapp/campaign: PASS - Creates campaign with batch_size, interval_seconds, media_url, media_type, add_reference_code
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/whatsapp/campaigns: PASS - Returns list of campaigns sorted by created_at desc
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/whatsapp/campaigns/{id}: PASS - Returns single campaign details, 404 for non-existent
backend_apis.POST /api/admin/whatsapp/send-test: PASS - Sends test message via v2 API
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/whatsapp/logs: PASS - Returns message logs with limit parameter
backend_apis.Batch size limits (1-50): PASS - Values outside range are capped
backend_apis.Interval minimum (5 sec): PASS - Values below 5 are set to 5
backend_apis.Reference code generation: PASS - IDSEA-XXXXXX format with random alphanumeric
backend_apis.Media attachments: PASS - image and document types supported
backend_apis.Authentication required: PASS - All admin endpoints return 401/403 without auth

whatsapp_admin_page.tabs: PASS - 4 tabs: Configuration, Send Messages, Marketing Campaign, Logs

configuration_tab.instance_id_input: PASS - Input for WhatsApp instance ID

send_messages_tab.test_phone_input: PASS - Input for test phone number
send_messages_tab.send_bulk_button: PASS - Starts bulk send in background

marketing_campaign_tab.target_audience_dropdown: PASS - All Approved Members, Event Registrations, Custom Phone List
marketing_campaign_tab.filter_by_plan_dropdown: PASS - All Plans, Academic, Entrepreneur, Corporate, International
marketing_campaign_tab.event_select_dropdown: PASS - Appears when Event Registrations selected
marketing_campaign_tab.custom_phones_textarea: PASS - Appears when Custom Phone List selected
marketing_campaign_tab.reference_code_toggle: PASS - Checked by default, shows explanation
marketing_campaign_tab.message_preview: PASS - Shows {name} replaced with 'Dr. Sample Person' and reference code
marketing_campaign_tab.start_campaign_button: PASS - Creates campaign and shows toast notification
marketing_campaign_tab.campaign_history: PASS - Shows campaigns with status badges and progress bars

logs_tab.table_columns: PASS - Phone, Type, Message, Status, Time
logs_tab.log_entries: PASS - Shows message history with sent/failed status

marketing_campaign_elements: Target Audience dropdown (All Approved Members, Event Registrations, Custom Phone List)
Filter by Plan dropdown (All Plans, Academic, Entrepreneur, Corporate, International)
Add Random Reference Code toggle with explanation

notes.whatsapp_instance: Shows 'Disconnected' since no active WhatsApp instance is configured - this is expected behavior
notes.message_delivery: Messages will fail since no active WhatsApp instance - API contract tested, not actual delivery
notes.background_tasks: Campaign runs as background task with batching and interval delays
